relevance_sentence: Claims a control method for a refrigerator-conduction-cooled superconducting coil that derives an 'effective cooling curve' from the refrigerator's rated cooling capacity and measured thermal resistance, then controls coil energization (including a real-time monitoring/automatic-current-reduction variant) so generated heat stays below that curve -- functionally very close to CF-4's core mechanism and the single most damaging hit found this session.
title_original: Operation control method for superconducting coil
abstract_original_excerpt: A control method allowing stable operation of a refrigerator conduction cooling type superconducting coil employing an oxide high temperature superconductor is provided.
